name: Test triage
when_to_use: A specific test is failing, flaky, or unacceptably slow

name: Test review
when_to_use: Audit existing tests for quality, smells, redundancy, false-pass risk

name: Test authoring
when_to_use: Design a new test or test plan for a new feature

name: Test strategy
when_to_use: Decide what to test at which layer; shape the suite as a portfolio

name: Test pruning
when_to_use: Decide which tests to delete (low value, redundant, characterizing dead code)
